name: Wand of Paralysis
description:
This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to expend 1 charge to cause a thin blue ray to streak from the tip toward a creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw or have the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of the target's turns, it repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.
